subject: fix(sancio): standardize all API request/response fields to snake_case
body:
Renames 10 camelCase request body fields and 1 response field across 6
Sancio endpoints to snake_case, matching the existing response convention
(raw Supabase rows). This eliminates the naming inconsistency where
validated fields (via validation.ts) used snake_case but inline-validated
fields used camelCase.

Fields renamed:
- projectId → project_id (invite, verify-passphrase req + response)
- counterpartyEmail → counterparty_email (invite)
- passphraseLink → passphrase_link (invite)
- moduleIds → module_ids (split, batch-ready)
- newTitle → new_title (split)
- moduleOrder → module_order (sequence)
- responseContent → response_content (resolve proposal)
- agreementId → agreement_id (create verification)

BREAKING: sun-sea-o frontend must be updated to send snake_case field
names. Deploy backend first, then frontend immediately after.

Tags: api, sancio, naming, consistency
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: api
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: api-naming-consistency
Semver: major
